name: Image To STL
tagline: Convert image to STL for 3D printing — drop a photo, get a printable model in minutes
description: Upload a JPG or PNG photo and receive a 3D-printable STL mesh in minutes. Supports single-image and multi-view (2–4 angles) input, optional color texture for preview and GLB export, and in-browser 3D inspection before download. No CAD skills or setup required. Paid plans include commercial rights.
instruction: 1. Upload one JPG/PNG photo (or 2–4 angles for multi-view). 2. Optionally pick None, Standard, or HD texture for preview and GLB. 3. Preview the 3D model in the browser viewer — rotate, zoom, inspect. 4. Download STL for your slicer or GLB for game engines.

coreFeatures.title: Photo to 3D in Minutes
coreFeatures.description: Drop a JPG or PNG and get a 3D model. No CAD skills, no setup. Best for symmetric or front-facing subjects with even lighting.

coreFeatures.title: Multi-View Fusion
coreFeatures.description: Upload 2 to 4 angles of the same object. The converter combines them into one model, filling in the back and sides for better accuracy.

coreFeatures.title: Text to 3D Mode
coreFeatures.description: Describe what you want in text instead of uploading a photo. The AI builds a 3D model from your description.

coreFeatures.title: Full Detail by Default
coreFeatures.description: Every conversion runs at full detail — contours and surface lines survive into the mesh. No blocky, simplified output.

coreFeatures.title: In-Browser 3D Preview
coreFeatures.description: Inspect every angle in the built-in 3D viewer before downloading. Rotate, zoom, and tweak texture or rerun.

coreFeatures.title: STL + GLB Export
coreFeatures.description: Download STL for 3D printing (load into any slicer) or GLB for game engines, AR/VR, and 3D modeling tools.

useCases: 3D printing hobbyists: upload a phone photo and print it tonight
Product designers: run a reference shot into a physical prototype
Game and AR/VR developers: export concept art as GLB for rapid prototyping
Teachers: turn diagrams into objects students can hold
Gifts and keepsakes: convert a portrait or child's drawing into a 3D print
Tabletop hobbyists: generate printable miniatures from concept art

faqs.question: What is an image to STL converter?
faqs.answer: An image to STL converter turns a 2D photo into a 3D model saved as an STL file. AI reads depth from the photo and outputs a printable mesh.

faqs.question: What image formats are supported?
faqs.answer: JPG and PNG. For best results, use a clear photo with even lighting and a clean background.

faqs.question: What other formats can I download besides STL?
faqs.answer: Every conversion can be exported as GLB, which works in game engines, AR/VR projects, and most 3D modeling software.

faqs.question: Should I use one photo or multiple?
faqs.answer: One photo works for most projects. For asymmetric or detailed subjects, multi-view with 2 to 4 angles gives better coverage on the back and sides.

faqs.question: What do the Standard and HD texture options change?
faqs.answer: They only affect the color texture for previews and GLB export. The mesh detail is the same regardless of texture choice.

faqs.question: Can I use my STL files commercially?
faqs.answer: Yes, on paid plans. Every file generated on Pro or Max includes full commercial rights.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes. Cancel on your billing page in one click. Credits stay active until the current billing period ends.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Case by case. Email support@imagetostl.me within 7 days. Credits and access remain active until the billing period ends after cancellation.

seo.title: Image To STL — AI 3D Model Generator Online
seo.description: Convert JPG/PNG photos to STL files for 3D printing. Upload one image or multiple angles, preview in 3D, download STL or GLB.
